# Copied from https://peps.python.org/pep-0562/
def __getattr__(name: str) -> typing.Any:
    if name in __all__:
        return importlib.import_module("." + name, __name__)
    raise AttributeError(f"module {__name__!r} has no attribute {name!r}")
